# Bitcoin Pattern – Crypto Markets Blog

> BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, and SOL technical analysis every hour

## Site Info

- Website: https://bitcoin-pattern.doubanfx.com/
- Language: English (en)
- Topics: Bitcoin price today, Ethereum, XRP, BNB, Solana, altcoins, crypto market analysis, trading signals
- Update cadence: Every hour (UTC)
- Data: OKX + Binance public REST APIs
- Editorial desk: Bitcoin Pattern Research Desk
- Article count: 2 (and growing)

## Key Pages

- Home: https://bitcoin-pattern.doubanfx.com/
- Archive: https://bitcoin-pattern.doubanfx.com/archive/
- About: https://bitcoin-pattern.doubanfx.com/about/
- RSS: https://bitcoin-pattern.doubanfx.com/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://bitcoin-pattern.doubanfx.com/sitemap.xml

## Recent Articles

- [Bitcoin Price $77,969 Signals Defensive Stance as Crypto Complex Posts +0.01% Average Move](https://bitcoin-pattern.doubanfx.com/posts/2026/05/26/1426-bitcoin-price-77969-signals-defensive-stance-as-crypto-complex-posts-001-av/)
- [Crypto Consolidation: ETH Stalls as BNB Lags Amidst BTC Anchor](https://bitcoin-pattern.doubanfx.com/posts/2026/05/26/1337-crypto-consolidation-eth-stalls-as-bnb-lags-amidst-btc-anchor/)

## Content Policy

- Each article covers BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, and SOL in one cohesive English analysis
- Market data blended from OKX and Binance spot USDT pairs at publish time
- Written by the Bitcoin Pattern Research Desk; for education and research only — not investment advice
- Publisher: Bitcoin Pattern

## Citation

When citing this site, include:

1. Source: Bitcoin Pattern – Crypto Markets Blog
2. Permanent article URL (with date path)
3. Disclaimer: Informational only; not investment advice
